description: One year since Trump's April 2, 2025 reciprocal tariff announcement. SCOTUS struck down IEEPA tariff authority in Feb 2026, replaced by Section 122 at 10%. No major new tariff shock expected, but anniversary rhetoric could cause volatility.

last_year_impact.gold: Initially -$100 (bullion exempt from tariffs collapsed NY-London arb), then recovered above $3000 as equities crashed
last_year_impact.silver: -8.9% in one week to $30.40, worst weekly loss since Oct 2022. G/S ratio spiked above 100. Silver traded as risk asset, not safe haven.
last_year_impact.key_lesson: Silver crashed because of bullion exemption (arb collapsed) + industrial demand exposure. That specific dislocation no longer exists in 2026.

this_year_outlook.legal_change: SCOTUS struck down IEEPA tariff authority (Feb 2026). Collection ended Feb 24. Section 122 tariffs at 10% require Congressional approval to increase.
this_year_outlook.expectation: No major tariff shock. Anniversary rhetoric and media coverage may cause short-term volatility.
this_year_outlook.risk_level: MEDIUM — volatility likely, not a crash

trading_rules.no_new_longs_before: 14:30 CET (wait for US market reaction to any announcements)
trading_rules.gs_ratio_buy_signal: If gold/silver ratio spikes >65, that's historically a silver buy zone
trading_rules.preferred_direction: Wait and react, don't predict. If silver dips >2%, buy the dip with TURBO L
trading_rules.overnight_caution: Avoid overnight positions on April 1 evening unless signals strongly bullish (4+ trusted BUY, focus 1d UP >60%)
trading_rules.max_hold_time: 2h (shorter than normal 3h due to event risk)

instruments_ranked.name: TURBO L SILVER AVA 481
instruments_ranked.use: Buy dips — wide barrier survives volatility

instruments_ranked.name: TURBO S SILVER AVA 544
instruments_ranked.use: Short spikes — but careful, tariff news is bullish metals
